scheduledDowngrade.bannerDesc: Your plan will change to {{plan}} on {{date}}. You can enjoy your current plan until then.
scheduledDowngrade.cancelSuccess: Your scheduled plan change has been cancelled.
scheduledDowngrade.applyConfirm: Are you sure you want to apply this downgrade immediately? Excess chatbots and integrations will be paused right away.
scheduledDowngrade.applySuccess: Your plan has been downgraded immediately.

downgradeModal.title: Downgrade Plan
downgradeModal.subtitle: Review the impact of downgrading from {{from}} to {{to}}
downgradeModal.effectiveDateDesc: Changes take effect at the end of your current billing period.
downgradeModal.pauseNote: Paused chatbots & integrations are not deleted. Upgrade anytime to reactivate them.
downgradeModal.surveyTitle: Help us improve — why are you downgrading?
downgradeModal.successMsg: Your plan will be downgraded on {{date}}.
downgradeModal.errorMsg: Failed to schedule downgrade. Please try again.

success.verifyingDesc: Securely confirming your transaction. This will only take a moment.
success.confirmed: Payment confirmed. Your account is now upgraded.
success.timeoutDesc: We're still waiting for the bank confirmation. Please refresh this page in a minute.
success.failedDesc: We couldn't verify your payment. If money was deducted, please contact support.
